ns0:entry.ns0:title: CesiumGS/cesium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CesiumGS/cesium
Language: javascript
An open-source JavaScript library for world-class 3D globes and maps 🌎

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WebGoat/WebGoat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WebGoat/WebGoat
Language: javascript
WebGoat is a deliberately insecure application

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
Language: javascript
CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WhiskeySockets/Baileys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WhiskeySockets/Baileys
Language: javascript
Socket-based TS/JavaScript API for WhatsApp Web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Jira and Confluence with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dataease/SQLBot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dataease/SQLBot
Language: javascript
🔥 基于大模型和 RAG 的智能问数系统，对话式数据分析神器。Text-to-SQL Generation via LLMs using RAG.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: expo/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/expo/skills
Language: javascript
A collection of AI agent skills for working with Expo projects and Expo Application Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gsd-build/get-shit-done
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done
Language: javascript
A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: justlovemaki/AIClient-2-API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/justlovemaki/AIClient-2-API
Language: javascript
Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Qwen Code, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: liyupi/ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liyupi/ai-guide
Language: javascript
程序员鱼皮的 AI 资源大全 + Vibe Coding 零基础教程，分享大模型选择指南（DeepSeek / GPT / Gemini / Claude）、最新 AI 资讯、Prompt 提示词大全、AI 知识百科（RAG / MCP / A2A）、AI 编程教程、AI 工具用法（Cursor / Claude Code / OpenClaw / TRAE / Lovable / Agent Skills）、AI 开发框架教程（Spring AI / LangChain）、AI 产品变现指南，帮你快速掌握 AI 技术，走在时代前沿。本项目为开源文档版本，已升级为鱼皮 AI 导航网站

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mozilla-firefox/firefox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mozilla-firefox/firefox
Language: javascript
The official repository of Mozilla's Firefox web browser.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nasa-gibs/worldview
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nasa-gibs/worldview
Language: javascript
Interactive interface for browsing global, full-resolution satellite imagery

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vercel-labs/agent-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-skills
Language: javascript
Vercel's official collection of agent skills
